scenarios.title: Mobility Combat Platformer
scenarios.intent: A small action-platformer prototype focused on aerial movement, ranged combat, reload pacing, and readable cooldown feedback.

expected.notes: Should produce useful support and dependency suggestions without treating the concept as impossible.

scenarios.title: Online Co-op Time Rewind Risk
scenarios.intent: A risky co-op prototype exploring rewind with shared traversal state and physics-heavy movement.

expected.notes: Should surface the explicit time-rewind and online co-op conflict, plus high scope pressure from rewind/network state.

scenarios.title: Survival Resource Loop
scenarios.intent: A survival loop built around hunger, thirst, temperature, day-night pressure, and readable meter feedback.

expected.notes: Should show save/load and UI risk while keeping the survival core intact.

scenarios.title: Roguelike Run Builder
scenarios.intent: A run-based roguelike concept with procedural floors, upgrade choices, relic synergy, shops, and meta progression.

expected.notes: Should identify procedural and reward-pool dependencies and flag tuning-heavy progression/synergy risk.

scenarios.title: Strategy Fog/Tech Concept
scenarios.intent: A small strategy prototype combining fog of war, tech progression, unit counters, minimap readability, and unlockable abilities.

expected.notes: Should connect visibility, progression, UI, and counter-system support without inventing conflicts.

scenarios.title: Horror Stealth Loop
scenarios.intent: A stealth-horror loop with sanity, limited light, hiding, AI patrol, line-of-sight detection, and safe-room relief.

expected.notes: Should keep suggestions focused on horror, AI, and stealth readability rather than unrelated economy/progression systems.

scenarios.title: Crafting Economy Progression
scenarios.intent: A crafting-heavy loop with recipes, queued production, material wallets, shop access, crafting unlocks, and inventory grid UX.

expected.notes: Should show inventory, material transaction, UI, and save-load pressure without presenting the concept as conflict-heavy.

scenarios.title: Physics Puzzle Room
scenarios.intent: A small puzzle room using pressure plates, keys, push-pull physics, one-way platforms, and interaction prompts.

expected.notes: Should treat the room as a medium-to-high puzzle/physics implementation, not as a hard-conflict concept.

scenarios.title: Vehicle Upgrade Arcade
scenarios.intent: An arcade vehicle concept with boost, upgradeable parts, suspension handling, coins, an upgrade shop, and readable damage feedback.

expected.notes: Should connect vehicle tuning with economy/progression support and not surface unrelated hard conflicts.

scenarios.title: Accessibility-heavy Platformer
scenarios.intent: A precision-platformer prototype that deliberately includes input forgiveness and player-facing accessibility settings.

expected.notes: Should recognize accessibility mechanics as intentional support, not disposable filler.
